display_html:
data FmtF m ann r
  • = Fail
  • | Empty
  • | Leaf !Int !m
  • | Cat r r
  • | Line
  • | FlatAlt r r
  • | Nest !Int r
  • | Union r r
  • | Ann ann r
  • | Column (Int -> r)
  • | Nesting (Int -> r)
name: FmtF Fail Empty Nest Union Ann Cat Column FlatAlt Leaf Line Nesting
